# Executable Example: <Title>

<summary>How to use this template</summary>

- Place runnable examples under `docs/examples/` or the relevant feature
  directory.
- Provide copy-paste ready commands with expected outputs or screenshots.
- Tag CLI blocks with `<!-- verify:cli -->` to enable automated validation.
- Remove this block once the example is complete.

</details>

## Objective

## Prerequisites

- Python 3.11 environment prepared
- Datasets downloaded (`sample.csv`, etc.)
- Environment variables set (`TRADEPULSE_ENV=dev`)
